cca-desc: Assures an agreement to Creative Commons licencing
cca-agreement-WikiSkripta:
I will release all my texts under the Attribution 4.0
(CC-BY-4.0) licence. Details can be found at WikiSkripta:Autorské právo.
cca-agreement-Profiles:
I will release all my texts under the Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0
(CC-BY-SA-4.0) licence. Details can be found at Profiles:Autorské právo.
cca-agreement-Wikimedic:
I will release all my texts under the Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0
(CC-BY-SA-4.0) licence. Details can be found at Wikimedic:Autorské právo.
cca-agreement-StaTest:
I will release all my texts under the Attribution 4.0
(CC-BY-4.0) licence. Details can be found at StaTest:Autorské právo.
cca-agreement-ÚLBLD-VZ:
I will release all my texts under the Attribution 3.0 Czech Republic
(CC-BY-3.0-CZ) licence. Details can be found at ÚLBLD-VZ:Autorské právo.
cca-agreement-WikiLectures:
I will release all my texts under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0
(CC-BY-SA) licence. Details can be found at WikiLectures:Author_Law.
